allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5173/predict -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json, text/plain, */*' -d '{"warehouse":"莱阳嘉兴畜达商贸有限公司","page":1,"page_size":500}')
Bash(curl -s -G --data-urlencode "warehouse=莱阳嘉兴畜达商贸有限公司" --data-urlencode "page=1" --data-urlencode "page_size=200" "http://localhost:5174/predict/results")
